name: CryoDRGN
description: Given a cryo-EM dataset (from CryoSPARC or RELION), reconstruct continuous distributions of 3D density maps. Use interactive tools to visualize a dataset's distribution of per-particle variability, generate density maps for exploratory analysis, extract particle subsets for use with other tools and generate trajectories to visualize molecular motions.
capabilities: Given a cryo-EM dataset (from CryoSPARC or RELION), reconstruct continuous distributions of 3D density maps

Use interactive tools to visualize a dataset's distribution of per-particle variability, generate density maps for exploratory analysis, extract particle subsets for use with other tools and generate trajectories to visualize molecular motions

particles.description: Particle stack file from CryoSPARC or RELION (.cs, .star, or .mrcs)

ctf.description: CTF parameters file for the particle stack

poses.description: Pose parameters file from a consensus reconstruction
